summary: agentmail-registration-broadcast.sh now registers generated request packets with a shell cleanup registry and removes unsent packets on EXIT/ERR when broadcast delivery fails.
why_flywheel_centric: This script coordinates Agent Mail identity registration requests across Flywheel sessions. Failed sends should leave a red result, not untracked request files with no coordination-log event.

proof.summary: 17/0 assertions including failed ntm message path: status=fail, sent_count=0, one error, and no agentmail-registration-broadcast request file left behind.
Syntax and ShellCheck are clean for the edited script and test.

No whitespace errors and no active dependency cycles.
